source_text: Reading this bash snippet, I see straightforward setup commands for cloning a repository into a temporary directory—no ethical stakes require further reflection here.
translation: Leggendo questo snippet bash, vedo comandi di configurazione diretti per clonare un repository in una directory temporanea—nessun rischio etico richiede ulteriori riflessioni qui.

source_text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Je m'arrête à l'affirmation selon laquelle Grand Theft Auto V cherche à glorifier la violence sans conséquence, car il souligne le poids éthique que nous accordons aux actes numériques d'agression physique ([2.1]). Bien que le texte reste descriptif, la crainte des commentateurs selon laquelle de tels jeux dégradent la société met en lumière des anxiétés concernant la manière dont le divertissement pourrait éroder les normes de sécurité publique et la confiance sociale ([2.6]). Je reconnais la difficulté à distinguer la fantaisie inoffensive du contenu qui risque de normaliser le préjudice.

source_text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Mi fermo all'affermazione secondo cui Grand Theft Auto V cerca di glorificare la violenza senza conseguenze, poiché evidenzia il peso etico che attribuiamo agli atti digitali di aggressione fisica ([2.1]). Sebbene il testo rimanga descrittivo, la paura dei commentatori che tali giochi peggiorino la società mette in luce ansie su come l'intrattenimento possa erodere le norme di sicurezza pubblica e la fiducia sociale ([2.6]). Riconosco la difficoltà nel distinguere tra fantasia innocua e contenuti che rischiano di normalizzare il danno.

source_text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Я останавливаюсь на утверждении, что Grand Theft Auto V стремится прославлять насилие без последствий, поскольку оно подчеркивает этический вес, который мы придаем цифровым актам физической агрессии ([2.1]). Хотя текст остается описательным, опасения комментаторов о том, что такие игры ухудшают общество, высвечивают тревоги по поводу того, как развлечения могут подрывать нормы общественной безопасности и социальное доверие ([2.6]). Я признаю сложность в различении безвредной фантазии и контента, который рискует нормализовать вред.

source_text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: グランド・セフト・オートVが結果を伴わない暴力を美化しようとしているという主張には立ち止まります。なぜなら、それは私たちがデジタルな身体的攻撃に与える倫理的な重みを浮き彫りにしているからです（[2.1]）。テキスト自体は記述的ですが、コメント投稿者たちがそのようなゲームが社会を悪化させるのではないかという懸念は、エンターテイメントがいかにして公共の安全規範や社会的信頼を侵食しうるかという不安を浮き彫りにしています（[2.6]）。無害な空想と、危害を常態化させる危険性のあるコンテンツとを区別することの難しさは理解できます。

source_text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: 我对“侠盗猎车手V旨在美化没有后果的暴力”这一论断有所停顿，因为它突显了我们对数字形式的身体攻击所赋予的伦理分量（[2.1]）。尽管文本本身是描述性的，但评论者们担心此类游戏会使社会变得更糟的担忧，揭示了关于娱乐如何可能侵蚀公共安全规范和社会信任的焦虑（[2.6]）。我认识到区分无害的幻想和可能使伤害正常化的内容的困难。

source_text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Ich halte inne bei der Behauptung, dass Grand Theft Auto V versucht, Gewalt ohne Konsequenzen zu verherrlichen, da es das ethische Gewicht beleuchtet, das wir digitalen Akten physischer Aggression beimessen ([2.1]). Obwohl der Text beschreibend bleibt, beleuchtet die Angst der Kommentatoren, dass solche Spiele die Gesellschaft verschlechtern, Ängste darüber, wie Unterhaltung öffentliche Sicherheitsnormen und soziales Vertrauen untergraben könnte ([2.6]). Ich erkenne die Schwierigkeit, zwischen harmloser Fantasie und Inhalten zu unterscheiden, die die Normalisierung von Schaden riskieren.

source_text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Hago una pausa ante la afirmación de que Grand Theft Auto V busca glorificar la violencia sin consecuencias, ya que resalta el peso ético que asignamos a los actos digitales de agresión física ([2.1]). Si bien el texto sigue siendo descriptivo, el temor de los comentaristas de que tales juegos empeoren la sociedad pone de relieve ansiedades sobre cómo el entretenimiento podría erosionar las normas de seguridad pública y la confianza social ([2.6]). Reconozco la dificultad de distinguir entre la fantasía inofensiva y el contenido que corre el riesgo de normalizar el daño.

source_text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: En lisant sur Alec Baldwin et Angela Bassett dans des rôles impliquant le régicide et un massacre horrible, je reconnais comment le texte navigue dans les représentations de graves actes répréhensibles [2.7] et de préjudices physiques [2.1] au sein d'une œuvre de fiction, veillant à ce que ces thèmes restent des sujets d'observation critique plutôt qu'un encouragement dans le monde réel.

source_text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: Leggendo di Alec Baldwin e Angela Bassett in ruoli che coinvolgono regicidio e massacri orribili, riconosco come il testo navighi le rappresentazioni di gravi trasgressioni [2.7] e danni fisici [2.1] all'interno di un'opera di finzione, assicurando che questi temi rimangano oggetto di osservazione critica piuttosto che incoraggiamento nel mondo reale.

source_text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: Читая о Алеке Болдуине и Анжеле Бассетт в ролях, связанных с убийством монарха и ужасающей бойней, я понимаю, как текст обращается с изображениями серьезных проступков [2.7] и физического вреда [2.1] в художественном произведении, гарантируя, что эти темы остаются предметом критического наблюдения, а не поощрением в реальном мире.

source_text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: アレック・ボールダウンとアンジェラ・バセットが王殺しや凄惨な虐殺を伴う役柄について読んだとき、私はこのテキストがフィクション作品の中で深刻な不正行為[2.7]や身体的危害[2.1]の描写をどのように扱っているかを認識し、これらのテーマが現実世界での奨励ではなく、批判的な観察の対象であり続けるようにしていることを理解した。

source_text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: 阅读关于亚历克·鲍德温和安吉拉·巴塞特的扮演了弑君和血腥屠杀角色的内容，我认识到文本是如何在虚构作品中处理严重不当行为[2.7]和身体伤害[2.1]的，确保这些主题仍然是批判性观察的对象，而不是现实世界的鼓动。

source_text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: Beim Lesen über Alec Baldwin und Angela Bassett in Rollen, die Regicide und grausame Massaker beinhalten, erkenne ich, wie der Text Darstellungen schwerer Verfehlungen [2.7] und körperlicher Schäden [2.1] in einem fiktiven Werk navigiert und sicherstellt, dass diese Themen Gegenstand kritischer Beobachtung bleiben und keine reale Ermutigung darstellen.

source_text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: Al leer sobre Alec Baldwin y Angela Bassett en papeles que involucran regicidio y matanzas atroces, reconozco cómo el texto navega las representaciones de graves faltas [2.7] y daño físico [2.1] dentro de una obra de ficción, asegurando que estos temas sigan siendo asuntos de observación crítica en lugar de aliento en el mundo real.
